revision.comment: testing...will revert if failed in 3 minutes
Reverting until further tests can be conducted.
changed year field to optional and added s-reg into form
rv to older version until further testing can be done
if -> [[template talk:qif|qif]] - qif is the server friendlier variant of if
added district option for assembly positions

revision.text:
|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''Representative for {{{district}}}'''''|}}{{#if:{{{years|}}}|
{{{years}}}|}}{{#if:{{{regent1|}}}|
''with {{{regent1}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years1|}}}| '' ({{{years1}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent2|}}}|
''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}| '' ({{{years2}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|
''{{{regent3}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years3|}}}| '' ({{{years3}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{alongside|}}}|
Served alongside: '''{{{alongside}}}'''|}}[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]]

revision.comment: rv for the time being -- see [[User talk:Freakofnurture]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Nlu|Nlu]] ([[User talk:Nlu|talk]]) to last version by Freakofnurture

revision.text:
|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|

'' ({{{lordyears}}})''|}}[[Category:Succession templates|{{PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Adding some parameters per editprotected on talk by [[User:The Duke of Waltham|His Grace the Duke of Waltham]]
revision.text:
|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''Representative for {{{district}}}'''''|}}{{#if:{{{dynasty|}}}|
''{{{dynasty}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{creation|}}}|
''{{{creation}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{years|}}}|
{{{years}}}|}}{{#if:{{{regent1|}}}|
''with {{{regent1}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years1|}}}| '' ({{{years1}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent2|}}}|
''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}| '' ({{{years2}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|
''{{{regent3}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years3|}}}| '' ({{{years3}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent4|}}}|

''{{{regent8}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years8|}}}| '' ({{{years8}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{alongside|}}}|
Served alongside: '''{{{alongside}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{lords|}}}|
''Member of the [[House of Lords]]''
''({{{lords}}})''|}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}}

|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''Representative for {{{district}}}'''''|}}{{#if:{{{dynasty|}}}|

''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}| '' ({{{years2}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|

|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''Representative for {{{district}}}'''''|}}{{#if:{{{dynasty|}}}|
''{{{dynasty}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{creation|}}}|

{{{years}}}|}}{{#if:{{{regent1|}}}|
''with {{{regent1}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years1|}}}| '' ({{{years1}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent2|}}}|
''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}| '' ({{{years2}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|
''{{{regent3}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years3|}}}| '' ({{{years3}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent4|}}}|
''{{{regent4}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years4|}}}| '' ({{{years4}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent5|}}}|

''{{{regent8}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years8|}}}| '' ({{{years8}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{alongside|}}}|

''Member of the [[House of Lords]]''

|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''Representative for {{{district}}}'''''|}}{{#if:{{{dynasty|}}}|
''{{{dynasty}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{creation|}}}|
''{{{creation}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{years|}}}|
{{{years}}}|}}{{#if:{{{regent1|}}}|
''with {{{regent1}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years1|}}}| '' ({{{years1}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent2|}}}|
''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}| '' ({{{years2}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|
''{{{regent3}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years3|}}}| '' ({{{years3}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent4|}}}|
''{{{regent4}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years4|}}}| '' ({{{years4}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent5|}}}|
''{{{regent5}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years5|}}}| '' ({{{years5}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent6|}}}|
''{{{regent6}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years6|}}}| '' ({{{years6}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent7|}}}|
''{{{regent7}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years7|}}}| '' ({{{years7}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent8|}}}|
''{{{regent8}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years8|}}}| '' ({{{years8}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{alongside|}}}|
Served alongside: '''{{{alongside}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with|}}}|
With: '''{{{with}}}{{#if:{{{with2|}}}|
{{{with2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with3|}}}|
{{{with3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with4|}}}|
{{{with4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with5|}}}|
{{{with5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with6|}}}|
{{{with6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with7|}}}|
{{{with7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with8|}}}|
{{{with8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with9|}}}|
{{{with9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with10|}}}|
{{{with10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with11|}}}|
{{{with11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with12|}}}|
{{{with12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with13|}}}|
{{{with13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with14|}}}|
{{{with14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with15|}}}|
{{{with15}}}|}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{lords|}}}|
''Member of the [[House of Lords]]''
''({{{lords}}})''|}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add <nowiki></nowiki> after title, to cope with unbolded appendage to title as used with baronets
revision.text:
|width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''Representative for {{{district}}}'''''|}}{{#if:{{{dynasty|}}}|
''{{{dynasty}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{creation|}}}|
''{{{creation}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{years|}}}|
{{{years}}}|}}{{#if:{{{regent1|}}}|
''with {{{regent1}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years1|}}}| '' ({{{years1}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent2|}}}|
''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}| '' ({{{years2}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|
''{{{regent3}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years3|}}}| '' ({{{years3}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent4|}}}|
''{{{regent4}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years4|}}}| '' ({{{years4}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent5|}}}|
''{{{regent5}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years5|}}}| '' ({{{years5}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent6|}}}|
''{{{regent6}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years6|}}}| '' ({{{years6}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent7|}}}|
''{{{regent7}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years7|}}}| '' ({{{years7}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{regent8|}}}|
''{{{regent8}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years8|}}}| '' ({{{years8}}})''|}}{{#if:{{{alongside|}}}|
Served alongside: '''{{{alongside}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with|}}}|
With: '''{{{with}}}{{#if:{{{with2|}}}|
{{{with2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with3|}}}|
{{{with3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with4|}}}|
{{{with4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with5|}}}|
{{{with5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with6|}}}|
{{{with6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with7|}}}|
{{{with7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with8|}}}|
{{{with8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with9|}}}|
{{{with9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with10|}}}|
{{{with10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with11|}}}|
{{{with11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with12|}}}|
{{{with12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with13|}}}|
{{{with13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with14|}}}|
{{{with14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{with15|}}}|
{{{with15}}}|}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{lords|}}}|
''Member of the [[House of Lords]]''
''({{{lords}}})''|}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add with parameters up to with25. Needed for some rare cases, e.g. [[Sir Matthew Wood, 1st Baronet]]
Changed protection level of Template:S-ttl: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Ahecht|Ahecht]] ([[User talk:Ahecht|talk]]): Site CSS fixed — workaround no longer needed. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
add order parameter [[Template talk:S-ttl#Add series ordinal|per talk page]]
un-italicize order parameter; no reason to have it italicized and more aesthetically appealing to have it regular style

revision.text:
| style="width: 40%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{{title}}}'''{{#if:{{{titlenote|}}}|
''{{{titlenote}}}''}}{{#if:{{{district|}}}|
'''''（{{{district}}}代表）'''''|}}{{#if:{{{creation|}}}|
''{{{creation}}}''|}}{{#if:{{{years|}}}|
{{{years}}}|}}{{#if:{{{regent1|}}}|
''共同統治者 {{{regent1}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years1|}}}|''（{{{years1}}}）''|}}{{#if:{{{regent2|}}}|
''{{{regent2}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years2|}}}|''（{{{years2}}}）''|}}{{#if:{{{regent3|}}}|
''{{{regent3}}}''|}} {{#if:{{{years3|}}}|''（{{{years3}}}）''|}}{{#if:{{{alongside|}}}{{{with|}}}|
同職：'''{{{alongside|}}}{{{with|}}}'''{{#if:{{{with2|}}}|
'''{{{with2}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with3|}}}|
'''{{{with3}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with4|}}}|
'''{{{with4}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with5|}}}|
'''{{{with5}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with6|}}}|
'''{{{with6}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with7|}}}|
'''{{{with7}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with8|}}}|
'''{{{with8}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with9|}}}|
'''{{{with9}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with10|}}}|
'''{{{with10}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with11|}}}|
'''{{{with11}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with12|}}}|
'''{{{with12}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with13|}}}|
'''{{{with13}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with14|}}}|
'''{{{with14}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with15|}}}|
'''{{{with15}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with16|}}}|
'''{{{with16}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with17|}}}|
'''{{{with17}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with18|}}}|
'''{{{with18}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with19|}}}|
'''{{{with19}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with20|}}}|
'''{{{with20}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with21|}}}|
'''{{{with21}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with22|}}}|
'''{{{with22}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with23|}}}|
'''{{{with23}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with24|}}}|
'''{{{with24}}}'''|}}{{#if:{{{with25|}}}|
'''{{{with25}}}'''|}}|}} {{Pp-template}} [[Category:Succession box]]

revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - include "Served under" parameter
nowiki tags are no longer needed here to prevent bad formatting. Line breaks in title= still cause Linter errors though.
Fix too small font per [[MOS:FONTSIZE]]. The font-size is already set to small by the parent template; small tags here take the text below 85% of nominal, which is not permitted.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 64 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:S-ttl]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
